sourceMovie.title: Animal
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Animal works as a action movie with a point of view—fans quote moments, but they also argue about what the film is actually saying about power, desire, or survival. The action and crime blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: The Punisher
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Animal clicked for you, The Punisher (2004) is a strong next stop: both trade in action and crime, with momentum and clean stakes. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

recommendations.title: Death Wish
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Animal clicked for you, Death Wish (2018) is a strong next stop: both trade in action and crime, with unease that lingers after the credits. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Animal?
faq.answer: Try The Punisher, Death Wish, Street Kings—each shares DNA with Animal while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Animal?
faq.answer: Animal (2023) is best described as Action, Crime, Drama. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Animal part of a franchise?
faq.answer: Yes—it's part of the "The Animal Collection" storyline. You can enjoy it standalone, but sequels and tie-ins build on characters and continuity established here.
